steam_play_history.name: Steam
steam_play_history.description: Steam game records inferred from local Steam files

steam.description: Local Steam game activity and play sessions.

narration.recent_summary: Steam reports {game_name} was played recently, with {total_playtime} total playtime.

activation.title: Enable Steam
activation.description: Steam game records reveal gaming habits. Choose how the first sync should seed the timeline before this source starts running. Exact sessions are inferred only after the source is enabled.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether Steam game record sync is active.

steam_path.label: Steam Path
steam_path.description: Optional Steam install path. Leave empty to auto-detect the local Steam folder.

account_id.label: Steam Account
account_id.description: Local account id, account name, or auto for the most recently used local account.

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: How Steam game records should be synchronized.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to poll Steam playtime changes.

min_session_seconds.label: Minimum Session Duration (seconds)
min_session_seconds.description: Inferred play sessions shorter than this are ignored.

idle_timeout_minutes.label: Idle Timeout (minutes)
idle_timeout_minutes.description: A session is closed after this many minutes without additional Steam playtime.

max_items_per_sync.label: Max Items Per Sync
max_items_per_sync.description: Maximum number of Steam records to emit per sync.

include_uninstalled_games.label: Include Uninstalled Local Apps
include_uninstalled_games.description: Include local playtime entries for apps that are no longer installed. Names may be unavailable.

excluded_appids.label: Excluded Steam App IDs
excluded_appids.description: Steam app ids that should never be written to timeline memory.

excluded_keywords.label: Excluded Game Keywords
excluded_keywords.description: Game names containing these case-insensitive keywords are skipped before AI analysis.

initial_sync_policy.label: First Sync Scope
initial_sync_policy.description: Decide how much previous Steam activity should be imported.

options.from_now: Only record play from now on

initial_sync_lookback_days.label: Recent Days
initial_sync_lookback_days.description: Used when the first-sync scope is set to recent summaries.
